/usr/bin/clang++ -g CMakeFiles/OASISView.dir/OASISView_autogen/mocs_compilation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/OASISView.dir/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/OASISView.dir/MainWindow.cpp.o -o OASISView  /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libQt6Widgets.so.6.2.4 /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libQt6Gui.so.6.2.4 /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libQt6Core.so.6.2.4 /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libGLX.so /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libOpenGL.so
